text.heading: Setting of Exam Questions for English Language Programme
text.p: This is further to an earlier request and your subsequent acceptance to participate in setting examination questions for the English language Programme of the University of Nigeria.
text.heading: Exercise:
text.p: To set a minimum of 60 Objective questions, 60 Fill in the blank questions, 12 short essay questions and a marking guide per course assigned (please see the list below for course allocation).

p.boldface: Note: Please note that answers to the short essay questions will require a minimum of 25 words with keywords and concepts underlined.

text.heading: Financial Terms
Timeline for Submission
text.p: The timeline for submission is 2 weeks from today, 10/11/09. Early submissions will be appreciated to facilitate moderation and prompt remuneration.
text.heading: Course Material
text.p: The course material to be used for the exercise can be accessed on the University website
Please do not hesitate to contact me should further clarification be required. Thank you for your anticipated cooperation.
School of Arts and Social Sciences
